description:
Make your own story. User-friendly software for LLM roleplaying

RisuAI, or Risu for short, is a cross platform AI chatting software / web application with powerful features such as multiple API support, assets in the chat, regex functions and much more.
- Add: Claude 1 Hour caching
- Add: New Lua functions for retrieving last character and user messages
- Add: Docker multi-stage build support
- Add: note to persona
- Add: NAI v4.5 support and fix minor issues in NovelAI image generation
- Add: delete and reorder functionality to Custom Model accordion
- Add: Limited MCP support
- Improve: Chat Loading
- Improve: Trigger V2 context menu positioning and code organization
- Improve: Chat Copy Feature with Modern HTML Template
- Improve: Syntax highlighted code blocks
- Fix: API key priority for Custom Models with Claude format
- Fix: incorrect references on clipboard paste in Trigger v2
- Fix: Apply indentation to all lines for Trigger V2 effect description
- Fix: v2EndIndent positioning in nested if/else statements in Trigger v2
- Fix: fetchLog index bug in response streaming (Tauri)
- Fix: swapped span classes for single and double quotes
- fix: add null check for addChat in scripting API
